content.text:
### Technical Discussions & Decisions
- **Projector Update:** A new on/off switch and sound effects were added, but there are loading issues on play.hyperfy.xyz.
- **Drum Pad Improvement:** Refinements to colliders and visual effects were suggested.
- **Hyperfy V2 Aggregator:** A catalog of Hyperfy V2 URLs is being compiled.
- **Authentication System:** A session-based authentication system was built using Quart-auth, but JWT-based authentication was recommended for stateless sessions.
- **Plugin System for Mods:** Work is ongoing to convert mods to a new plugin system, with discussions on injection methods.
- **RigidBody Physics Enhancements:** New force application methods (`addForce()`, `addTorque()`) are live, with `addForceAtPos()` planned for vehicles.
- **Hyperfy Documentation Update:** Improvements to the README, including repo links and better accessibility, were discussed.
- **MCP Bridge for Hyperfy:** A bridge was developed to allow live script updates between MCP and Hyperfy.

### Concrete Solutions & Implementations
- **Auth System:** Session storage in PostgreSQL with cookies was implemented.
- **Plugin Injection:** `inject()` was recommended to avoid conflicts in mod systems.
- **Physics API:** Force application methods for rigid bodies were confirmed.
- **Hyperfy Docs Update:** A PR was submitted to improve documentation accessibility.
- **MCP Bridge:** A working prototype for live script updates between MCP and Hyperfy was created.

### Hyperfy on Apple Vision Pro
- Hyperfy v1 worked on Apple Vision Pro, but v2 is untested and may need tweaks.

### Avatar System Enhancements
- **Avatar Auto-Assignment:** A system was developed to assign random avatars to new users, persisting across sessions.
- **Avatar Database Integration:** Plans to integrate avatars from opensourceavatars.com directly instead of manual downloads, reducing .hyp file size.

### Three.js and Hyperfy
- **Hyperfy Unlocked Branch:** A command was shared to clone the unlocked branch, exposing Three.js and CSS3D features.
- **Three.js Support:** Some primitives work, but full support is still in progress. Using GLB models with code was suggested instead of embedding full HTML.

### AI Integration in Hyperfy
- AI features are being developed, with links to AI-related guides shared.
- Developers use Claude and Cursor for AI-assisted coding.

### GameJam Participation
- A suggestion was made to join a GameJam for Hyperfy visibility, requiring the unlocked version.

### Action Items
#### Technical Tasks
1. Fix projector loading issue on play.hyperfy.xyz.
2. Improve drum pad colliders and add visual effects.
3. Convert all mods to the new plugin injection system.
4. Implement `rigidbody.addForceAtPos()` for vehicles.
5. Improve MCP-Hyperfy bridge for live script updates.
6. Test Hyperfy on Apple Vision Pro v2.
7. Optimize .hyp file size by loading avatars from URLs.
8. Expand Three.js support in Hyperfy.

#### Documentation Needs
9. Add Hyperfy repo link to README.
10. Clarify Three.js capabilities in Hyperfy docs.
11. Document the avatar auto-assignment system.
12. Update AI integration documentation.

#### Feature Requests
13. Enable full Three.js object support in Hyperfy.
14. Improve AI-assisted coding in Hyperfy.
15. Develop a UI for selecting avatars from a database.
16. Improve error handling for Three.js scripts in Hyperfy.
17. Create a GameJam-friendly version of Hyperfy.
18. Improve onboarding documentation for new users.

categories.title: Hyperfy Development Updates and Technical Discussions

content.text:
### Technical Discussions & Decisions
- **Projector Update:** A new on/off switch and sound effects were added, but there are issues loading on play.hyperfy.xyz.
- **Drum Pad Improvement:** Refinements to colliders and visual effects were suggested.
- **Authentication System:** A session-based authentication system was built using Quart-auth, but a JWT-based stateless approach was recommended.
- **Plugin System for Mods:** Work is ongoing to convert mods to a new plugin system, with discussions on injection methods.
- **RigidBody Physics Enhancements:** New force application methods (`addForce()`, `addTorque()`) are live, with `addForceAtPos()` planned for vehicles.
- **Hyperfy Documentation Update:** Improvements to the README were discussed, including adding repo links and better accessibility.
- **MCP Bridge for Hyperfy:** A bridge was developed to allow live script updates between MCP and Hyperfy.

### Hyperfy Features & Compatibility
- **Hyperfy on Apple Vision Pro:** v1 worked, but v2 is untested and may need tweaks.
- **Avatar Auto-Assignment System:** A system was developed to assign random avatars to new users, persisting across sessions.
- **Avatar Database Integration:** Plans to integrate avatars directly from a database instead of manual downloads.
- **Three.js in Hyperfy:** Some primitives work, but full support is still in progress. Using GLB models with code is recommended.
- **AI Integration:** AI features are being developed, with guides available.
- **GameJam Participation:** Hyperfy could be used for a GameJam but requires an unlocked version.

### VR & UI Enhancements
- **Building Generation & Optimization:** AI-assisted 3D modeling is being used to construct 500 buildings, with atlasing and instancing for performance optimization.
- **Texture Customization:** Krea allows for flexible texture modifications.
- **VR Compatibility Issue:** VR mode is not fully loading, but a fix was pushed in the latest dev branch.
- **UI & Interaction Enhancements:** Updates to padding and margins improve image layout, and a proximity trigger version was created.
- **Device Compatibility:** The project runs on an iPhone 12, suggesting it should work on newer devices like the Snapdragon XR2 (Quest 3).

### Market Update
- **SOL Price:** The current price of SOL is $126.12.
